chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 827 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.4431/2025 2. For orders on Misc. No.4432/2025 3. For orders on Misc. No.4433/2025 4. For hearing of main case 28.02.2025 Mr. Ali Azad Salim, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgent application. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. The petitioner has impugned a challan issued by the Cantonment Board, however, there is no challenge to the assessment. Even otherwise, the assessment ought to have been challenged in the statutory hierarchy, hence, no case is made out to direct recourse in writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
